ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the academic program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the academic program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional comments or remarks about the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sections" (
  "section_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course section */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the course section */,
  "section_description" TEXT /* Description of the course section */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course section */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "section_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the course_sections table */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is offered in (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year the course is offered in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "offering_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the course_offerings table */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Inactive, Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the academic_programs table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_programs" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "program_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the academic_programs table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Quiz, Assignment, Exam) */,
  "weightage" TEXT /* Weightage of the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assessment_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the course_assessments table */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the student submitted the assessment */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score obtained by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id")
)
